data.Character_EN:
Belligerent and arrogant
Desires 'entertainment' out of even the most outrageous things
data.Hobby_JP: エンターテインメント（という名の邪知暴虐）
data.Hobby_EN: Entertainment (a name for tyranny and wickedness)
data.Favor_JP: 人が争い勝者が権力に溺れ敗者が絶望に打ちのめされる光景
data.Favor_EN: The sight of people clashing, winners drowning in power, and losers crushed by despair
data.Summary_JP:
もともと「財前 こさと」として若手超大物政治ジャーナリストをしていた謎の若人。
十数年前に突如 電撃引退を宣言し各メディアから姿を消していたが、ある時この名で目撃されたという情報が相次いでおり真相を迫られている。
好奇心旺盛で遊戯意識が強く 周りの出来事はすべて"エンタメ"として楽しんでいるが、時にその遊び心が「傲慢」さに変わり 夜月機関や運命線探偵、獣爾騎兵などへ強大な敵として牙を向くことも……
data.Summary_EN:
A mysterious young person who was originally a rising young mega-celebrity political journalist under the name 'Foster Empressor'.
They suddenly announced a stunning retirement more than a decade ago and vanished from all media, but reports of sightings under this name have been coming one after another, and the truth is being pressed.
Highly curious with a strong sense of play, they enjoy everything around them as 'entertainment', but sometimes that playfulness turns to 'Pride/Arrogance', and they bare their fangs as a powerful enemy against organizations like the Yadzuki, the FateLine Investigators, and the Shou'ar Riders...

data.InStory_JP: 百戦錬磨開発所として兵役中に遭難してしまっただけでなくパーツエンストを起こしてしまったところを六花雙葉/クィーン-トゥエルヴに拾われ、助けられた御恩に報いるべく（百戦錬磨開発所を裏切ってでも）ジャンクガレージに協力している
data.InStory_EN: On active military duty under HundredBattlers Development, it not only ended up stranded but also suffered a parts-failure shutdown — and was taken in by Dozenne Hexacrys / Queen.XII. In gratitude for being rescued, it now cooperates with the JunkGarage (even at the cost of betraying HundredBattlers Development)

data.Backgrounds_JP: 暴走事故により自律行動アルゴリズムや人権など、オートマトンの重大な課題を『第７の世界破壊』として轟かせてしまった

data.FormalName_JP: 千歳 玲
data.InStory_JP: もともと百戦錬磨開発所（の前身）の一員として弟と人形兵ゼロイドの開発に携わっていたが、"第７の世界破壊"に伴う素子メーカとの企業戦争の激化による人形兵ゼロイドの兵役個体化に反対しているため、偶然その首謀者であるロジケスキーロマンティカ産業に釣られたクィーン-トゥエルヴと出会い軍事運用されてしまった人形兵ゼロイドの鎮圧に協力するよう要請する
data.InStory_EN: Originally a member of the predecessor organization to HundredBattlers Development, involved with her younger brother in the development of AttackerZeroid humanoid infantry — but opposed to the militarization of individual AttackerZeroid units resulting from escalating corporate warfare between component manufacturers in the wake of 'The World Destruction Pandemic VII'. When she by chance encounters Queen.XII, who was lured in by Logicheskiy Romantika Industry — the mastermind behind it all — she petitions her to cooperate in suppressing the AttackerZeroid units that have been deployed for military use.

data.FormalName_JP: 千歳 励
data.InStory_JP: 人形兵ゼロイドを姉と開発したが、"第７の世界破壊"に伴う素子メーカとの企業戦争の激化による人形兵ゼロイドの兵役個体化に賛同してしまい、ロジケスキーロマンティカ産業に業務結託する形で百戦錬磨開発所として人形兵ゼロイドを用いた軍事開発を行っている
data.InStory_EN: Developed AttackerZeroid humanoid infantry together with his older sister, but came to support the militarization of individual units resulting from escalating corporate warfare between component manufacturers in the wake of 'The World Destruction Pandemic VII' — and now conducts military development using AttackerZeroid units under HundredBattlers Development, operating in collusion with Logicheskiy Romantika Industry.

data.Character_JP:
雙葉(表人格)：基本お淑やかで平穏を求めているものの裏人格に振り回されている受難体質
トゥエルヴ(裏人格)：強欲かつ傲慢でどんな手段を使ってでも欲しいものを手にしようとする
data.Character_EN:
Dozenne (front personality): fundamentally graceful and peace-seeking, yet constantly being dragged around by her alternate personality
Queen.XII (back personality): greedy and arrogant, willing to resort to any means to obtain what she wants
data.Hobby_JP:
人格共通：72ISシリーズ素子(現実世界でいう7400シリーズIC)のコレクション収集・査定
雙葉(表人格)：ジャンク店の運営、同人誌出版
トゥエルヴ(裏人格)：廃番・レアロットとなった型番の部品を入手すること
data.Hobby_EN:
Both personalities: collecting and appraising the 72IS series components (real-world equivalent: the 7400-series ICs)
Dozenne (front personality): running the junk shop, publishing doujinshi
Queen.XII (back personality): obtaining parts from discontinued or rare-lot model numbers
data.SpecialSkill_JP: ジャンク品の査定・再利用、廃品・スクラップの分解
data.SpecialSkill_EN: Appraising and repurposing junk items, disassembling discarded goods and scrap
data.Favor_JP:
人格共通：汎用集積素子部品 (=汎用IC)
雙葉(表人格)：旧いパーツを再利用すること
トゥエルヴ(裏人格)：生産中止になり入手困難となったレトロパーツ
data.Favor_EN:
Both personalities: GP-Comp.:general-purpose components (= generic ICs)
Dozenne (front personality): repurposing old parts
Queen.XII (back personality): retro parts that have been discontinued and become hard to obtain
data.Unlike_JP:
雙葉(表人格)：睡眠不足(裏人格が夕方から夜間を主として活動するため)、裏人格の暴走
トゥエルヴ(裏人格)：朝方から夕方前にかけての活動、入手不可能なものの存在
data.Unlike_EN:
Dozenne (front personality): sleep deprivation (as the alternate personality is primarily active from evening to nighttime), the alternate personality running rampant
Queen.XII (back personality): activity from morning to early afternoon, the existence of things that cannot be obtained
data.InStory_JP: 72ISシリーズの収集のため暴走している7274オートマトンを乱獲していたが、ある日 ロジケスキーロマンティカ産業からレアパーツを取引条件の報酬に持ち掛けられたことからオートマトンの暴走抑圧任務を承ってしまい九蓮国に降り立つが……
data.InStory_EN: Had been indiscriminately hunting rampaging 7274-series Automatons in order to collect the 72IS-series comps. — until one day, being approached by Logicheskiy Romantika Industry with an offer of rare parts as a reward under the terms of a deal, she took on the mission to suppress rogue Automatons and set foot in LotusNinea...

data.ChronoholderName_JPReading: じくうしどう/クロノライズ
data.ChronospecName_JPReading: しょうどうのはじまり
data.ChronospecAbout_JP: 時間の進行を加速させる

ChronospecStats.ChronoizedAbout_JP:
バイタリティに影響が出るほどの能力行使や適性は見られず。引き続き鎮圧任務などへ戦力投入が可能と思われる。
また、能力行使により時刻観測に異常がみられたなどの報告があるが、「当幹部の時空遷移能力による副作用でありこちらで被害の抑制対応を行う予定である」と弊機関は回答している。
ChronospecStats.ChronoizedAbout_EN:
No instances of ability use or aptitude significant enough to impact vitality have been observed. It is believed that continued deployment for suppression missions and similar operations will remain feasible.
Additionally, reports of anomalies in time observation following ability use have been received, to which the organization has responded: 'This is a side effect of the executive's Chronoizing ability, and we plan to implement measures to mitigate the damage on our end.'

data.Career_JP: 情報系の大学院修士課程を卒業後、事業を建てた功績を認められ夜月機関に加入。加入５年目前半で、幹部配属は３年目。
data.Career_EN: After completing a master's program in information sciences and being recognized for establishing a business, he joined the Yadzuki Orgs. Now in the first half of his 5th year since joining, and his 3rd year in executive assignment.

data.Unlike_JP: 女性に対するハラスメント、自分の老い
data.Unlike_EN: Harassment toward women, her own aging
data.Strength_JP: 面白いことがわかる
data.Strength_EN: Has a sense for what's funny

data.Summary_JP: ユーモアに溢れた幹部の風紀委員長だが、特に女性に対するハラスメントや自分の老いに過剰反応してしまいがち。

data.ChronoholderName_JPReading: じくうひょうけつ/クロノフリーズ
data.ChronospecAbout_JP: 時間の進行を止めて動きを封じる
data.ChronospecAbout_EN: Stops the flow of time, sealing movement

ChronospecStats.ChronoizedAbout_JP:
バイタルおよび能力行使についての問題は一切見られない。時空遷移状態の計測値も変動が一切見られないため、安定した制御が可能と弊機関は判断。
鎮圧任務でもかなりの功績を挙げているが、能力行使を受けた対象個体のバイタルサインが不安定になる現象が確認されているため、以後は生命体に対する攻撃手段としての行使を控えるよう注意している。
ChronospecStats.ChronoizedAbout_EN:
No issues whatsoever have been observed regarding vitality or ability use. As the measured values of Chronoizing states have shown no fluctuation at all, the organization has determined that stable control is achievable.
While she has accumulated considerable achievements in suppression missions, a phenomenon has been confirmed in which the vital signs of subjects exposed to her ability use become unstable. Accordingly, she has been cautioned to refrain from exercising her ability as a means of attack against living beings going forward.

data.Career_JP: ヒューマノイドにおける人権問題の解決へ関与した先代を追って祈願の配属を果たした。加入４年目後半で、幹部配属は３年目。
data.Career_EN: She joined and made her long-desired executive assignment in pursuit of her predecessor: 'Februarius', who had been involved in resolving human rights issues for humanoids. Now in the second half of her 4th year since joining, and her 3rd year in executive assignment.

data.ChronospecAbout_JP: 時間が進行するエネルギーを吸収する
data.ChronospecAbout_EN: Absorbs the energy of advancing time

ChronospecStats.ChronoizedAbout_JP: 能力の制御力や生命への影響やインシデントはないと思われていたが、ある幹部KY会議にて 自身による過剰な能力強化訓練を行っていたことが判明。すぐにバイタルチェックの確認を行ったところ－－（※文章はここで途切れている）
ChronospecStats.ChronoizedAbout_EN: It had been believed that there were no issues with ability control, life impact, or incidents — however, it was revealed at an executive hazard-awareness meeting that she had been conducting excessive ability-strengthening training on her own. A vital check was immediately conducted, whereupon — (* the text breaks off here)

data.Career_EN: After graduating from a prestigious public high school by skipping grades, she joined the Yadzuki Orgs. Now in the second half of her 3rd year since joining, and her 2nd year in executive assignment.

data.FormalName_JP: 花舞 流
data.Character_JP: おっとり天然系で幹部の癒しキャラ
data.Character_EN: Gentle and natural-type, the soothing presence among the executives
data.Summary_JP:
おっとり天然系で幹部の癒しキャラ。
幹部「水無月」こと雫とは夜月機関で３年前に出会ってから大の親友で、戦火に呑まれたトラウマもあり雫に執着している一面がある。
data.Summary_EN:
A gentle, natural-type who serves as the soothing presence among the executives.
She and 'Minadzuki' executive Aquanne, whom she met at the Yadzuki Orgs. three years ago, have been the best of friends — and with the trauma of being engulfed in the flames of war, she has a side that clings to Aquanne.
data.ChronoholderName_JPReading: じくうまんかい/クロノフィル
data.ChronospecAbout_JP: 力・斥力を発生させる程の強い波動を生み出す
data.ChronospecAbout_EN: Generates powerful waves capable of producing attractive and repulsive forces

ChronospecStats.ChronoizedAbout_JP:
弊機関に加入時は能力適正が著しく低く 戦闘要員としての招集は困難とみていたが、本人の希望により実践投与に向けて適正強化訓練を行っている。
ただ任務中 精神状態が著しく安定しない時があり、能力制御不能時に発生するスパイク反応で時空遷移状態がバイタルに悪影響を及ぼす可能性があるとみて、医療班にメンタルケアを手配する必要がある。
ChronospecStats.ChronoizedAbout_EN:
When she joined the organization, her ability aptitude was markedly low and it was considered difficult to recruit her as combat personnel — but, at her own request, aptitude-strengthening training toward practical deployment is underway.
However, there are times during missions when her mental state is significantly unstable, and a spike response occurring when ability control is lost may adversely affect her vitals through Chronoizing states. Accordingly, it has been deemed necessary to arrange mental health support from the medical unit.

data.Career_JP: 医大在学中で戦火に呑まれたところを夜月機関に拾われ、卒業後正式に加入。正式な加入から２年目後半・仮加入から４年目で、幹部に配属して間もない。
data.Career_EN: While enrolled at a medical university, she was rescued from the flames of war by the Yadzuki Orgs., and joined officially upon graduation. Now in the second half of her 2nd year since officially joining — 4th year since provisional entry — and has only recently been assigned to executive duties.

data.Character_JP: 自分の育ちと現状に対する自責思考が強く、ストイックになりやすい
data.Character_EN: Prone to strong self-blame regarding his upbringing and current situation; tends to become stoic

data.Weakness_EN: Has a mild gambling dependency and binge-eating tendencies
data.Summary_JP: 先進国生まれ先進国育ちでありながらなお非凡である自分に対する自責思考が強く、ストレスで軽いギャンブル依存と過食症に見舞われている。
data.Summary_EN: Despite being born and raised in a developed nation, his strong tendency toward self-blame for what he sees as a still-exceptional existence has led to mild gambling dependency and binge-eating tendencies under stress.
data.ChronoholderName_JPReading: じくうせいよう/クロノリーフ
data.ChronospecAbout_JP: 時空を細動状態にし、空間を揺るがす
data.ChronospecAbout_EN: Puts space-time into a fibrillating state, shaking the surrounding space

ChronospecStats.ChronoizedAbout_JP:
精神状態により適正計測値が大きく変動する傾向にあり、段階の判別が困難となっている。そのため、リスク管理の観点から 最高値（「トリナイン」(段階.III)相当）を概要値として情報開示するよう弊機関は対応。
能力行使によるバイタルサインの変動および精密検査については、症状の特定が難しいことから経過観察を余儀なくされているため 確定的な情報判断ができかねている。（備考：生活習慣にいくつか問題あり）
ChronospecStats.ChronoizedAbout_EN:
The measured aptitude values tend to fluctuate greatly depending on mental state, making stage determination difficult. As a result, from a risk management perspective, the organization has arranged to disclose the peak value (equivalent to 'TriNine' (Stage.III)) as the summary disclosed value.
As for fluctuations in vital signs and detailed examinations following ability use, definitive judgments cannot be made as symptom identification has necessitated continued observation. (Note: He makes several lifestyle issues)

data.Career_JP: 海外の大学院と大手企業を経て 夜月機関に加入。加入４年目前半で、幹部配属は１年間の降格処分期間を含めて２年目。
data.Career_EN: After an overseas graduate school and a major corporation, he joined the Yadzuki Orgs. Now in the first half of his 4th year since joining, and his 2nd year in executive assignment including a one-year demotion period.

縫い包み
大切な仲間たちのこと

data.ChronoholderName_JPReading: じくうれいるい/クロノドロップ
data.ChronospecAbout_JP: 時間を逆行し傷を癒す

ChronospecStats.ChronoizedAbout_JP:
能力適性検査および生体精密検査の結果、常時「クィントナイン」（段階.V）を超える高い適性を観測しているため、能力行使に関する許可は先代幹部と同様 バイタル面と能力制御の厳重な教育が絶対条件と思われる。
（※そのあとの文章は検閲により閲覧できない）
ChronospecStats.ChronoizedAbout_EN:
As a result of ability aptitude examination and detailed biological examination, the organization has consistently observed aptitude exceeding 'QuintNine' (Stage.V). Accordingly, permission for ability use is considered to be subject to the same absolute conditions as for the previous executive — namely, strict training in both vitality and ability control.
(* The subsequent text cannot be viewed due to censorship)

data.Career_JP: ４年前に自殺した先々代幹部の「水無瀬 青雲」の孫娘で、祖父を巡り夜月機関へ加入を志す。加入初年で、幹部配属試験を機関最短でクリアし幹部配属。
data.Career_EN: The granddaughter of 'Junius' (the late early-era executive) / 'Navisky Afterains', who died by suicide four years ago, she aspires to join the Yadzuki Orgs. in connection with her grandfather. In her first year of membership, she cleared the executive placement exam in the shortest time on agency record and was assigned to executive duties.

data.FormalName_JP: 綾沢 改奈

data.Character_EN: Graceful and composed, the refined presence among the executives
data.Favor_JP: 先代である母親の存在
data.Favor_EN: The existence of her mother, 'Julius' (who is a previous executive)
data.Summary_JP:
お淑やかで凛とした幹部の清楚枠。
理系の学問に四苦八苦しつつも、論文の校正作業を経て幹部配属を果たした。
data.Summary_EN:
Graceful and composed, the refined presence among the executives.
Despite struggling with science subjects, she accomplished her executive assignment through thesis proofreading work.
data.ChronoholderName_JPReading: じくうてんぷう/クロノテンペスト
data.ChronospecAbout_JP: 時空を薙ぎ払い、亀裂状の障壁をつくる
data.ChronospecAbout_EN: Sweeps through space-time, creating a crack-shaped barrier

ChronospecStats.ChronoizedAbout_JP:
検査結果によると 一定の条件を満たした場合にのみ「トリナイン」(段階.III)相当の適性を数回観測しているが、再現性に乏しく 今後は能力の発現訓練やバイタル強化を重点的に行うべきと判断。
バイタル面に関しては先代幹部の影響で過去にトラウマ意識があるとみられるため、能力の暴走が発生しないようメンタルケアも必要と思われる。
ChronospecStats.ChronoizedAbout_EN:
Examination results indicate that aptitude equivalent to 'TriNine' (Stage.III) has been observed on several occasions, but only when certain conditions are met; as reproducibility is limited, it has been determined that future efforts should focus on ability-manifestation training and vitality reinforcement.
Regarding vitality, it is believed that past trauma related to 'Julius'(a previous executive)'s influence may be present, and mental health support is also deemed necessary to prevent ability runaway.

data.Career_JP: 文豪一家生まれで学歴も文系育ちだが、母の影響を受けて夜月機関に加入。加入５年目前半で、幹部配属は１年目。
data.Career_EN: Born into a family of literary figures and having a humanities-focused academic background, she joined the Yadzuki Orgs. under her mother's influence. Now in the first half of her 5th year since joining, and her 1st year in executive assignment.

data.FormalName_JPReading: やさか ヘクター.キロバスター
data.Character_JP: 幹部の中では群を抜いて筋肉質だが、戦時中の経験で少し病弱基質な一面も併せ持つ
data.Character_EN: Far and away the most muscular of the executives, yet also has a somewhat frail side owing to wartime experiences
data.Weakness_JP: 戦時中の弱みを握られている
data.Weakness_EN: His wartime vulnerabilities are being held against him
data.Summary_JP:
陸軍所属時に瀕死に幾度もなったことへトラウマを持つ。
傷を負い右目の視力がなくなっているが、能力を行使しているときだけ開眼する。
加入時に自身の医務担当だった医療専門の幹部「長月」ことルイス-ノアとバディを組んでいることが多い。
data.Summary_EN:
Carries trauma from having been on the brink of death multiple times during his army service.
Though wounded and without sight in his right eye, it opens only when he exercises his ability.
He frequently partners with Luis-Noah, the medical specialist executive known as 'Nagatsuki', who was his attending physician at the time of his joining.
data.ChronoholderName_JPReading: じくうしゃくねつ/クロノスコーチ
data.ChronospecAbout_JP: 自身近辺の時空を隆起させ、強い負荷を代償に強力な身体能力を引き出す
data.ChronospecAbout_EN: Elevates the space-time around himself, drawing out powerful physical abilities at the cost of intense strain

ChronospecStats.ChronoizedAbout_JP:
バイタリティに障碍があるため再現は極めて困難とされるが、最高で「クィントナイン」(段階.V)の能力適正を過去の任務にて記録しており、これを参考値として弊機関は提出している。
ただし、能力の発現による過負荷と戦闘による負傷で身体に深刻な後遺症が残る可能性があるため、危険を伴う重要任務への投入は避けるべきと、医務総長であるルイス-ノアと協議の上で判断されている。
ChronospecStats.ChronoizedAbout_EN:
Due to physical disability affecting vitality, reproduction is considered extremely difficult — but, peak aptitude equivalent to 'QuintNine' (Stage.V) has been recorded during past missions, and the organization submits this as a reference value.
However, as there is a possibility that serious sequelae may remain in the body due to overload from ability manifestation combined with combat injuries, it has been determined through consultation with Medical Director Dr.Luis-Noah that deployment in high-risk important missions should be avoided.

data.Career_JP:
元陸軍所属である慣れ行きで、夜月機関の国防技術開発に関与。
加入してから３年目後半で、幹部配属から２年目後半。
data.Career_EN:
Through the course of his background as a former army soldier, he became involved in the Yadzuki Orgs.' national defense technology development.
Now in the second half of his 3rd year since joining, and the second half of his 2nd year in executive assignment.

data.Summary_EN:
A young man of unknown age. He joined the Yadzuki Orgs. with the aspiration to protect the nation, and through his diligent, justice-driven character and sincerity, became the first executive of the medical corps.
At first glance he appears to be in his late teens, yet there are rumors that he is in fact married with children — and he is widely celebrated as the Yadzuki Orgs.' 'ageless beauty'.

data.FormalName_JP: 霧島 博
data.Character_JP: 頭脳派で理屈っぽく、自分の目的のために動いているところがあり孤立している
data.Character_EN: Cerebral and argumentative; has a tendency to act for his own objectives and is isolated
data.Summary_JP:
頭脳派で理屈っぽい。
幹部に配属後も自分の目的のために動いているところがあり、他の幹部に対しても孤立している（対称的な幹部「師走」ことキャサリンを除いて）。
data.Summary_EN:
Cerebral and argumentative.
Even after being assigned to executive duties, he has a tendency to act for his own objectives, and remains isolated from other executives — with the exception of the contrasting 'Shiwasu' executive, Catherine.
data.ChronoholderName_JPReading: じくうけっしょう/クロノクリスタライズ
data.ChronospecAbout_JP: 時空を縫うように変化させ、物理法則を改竄(かいざん)する
data.ChronospecAbout_EN: Alters space-time in a weaving-like manner, rewriting physical laws

ChronospecStats.ChronoizedAbout_JP:
バイタリティに影響はないものの、本人は能力の強化訓練に対し酷く消極的な態度を示しているため、まだ最大限の能力適正ではないと思われる。
また、常時安定して99%+(段階.II)の適性を発揮するため、能力の制御も卓越としており、任務への行使に関しては問題がないと判断。ただ、強い空間改竄能力を有しているため、能力行使により周囲の環境を破壊するリスクがあるとみて、仮説霜月研究所全体でKY活動の徹底を呼びかけているが……
ChronospecStats.ChronoizedAbout_EN:
While there is no impact on vitality, the individual shows an extremely passive attitude toward ability-strengthening training, suggesting that maximum ability aptitude has not yet been achieved.
However, as stable aptitude consistently at 99%+ (Stage.II) is demonstrated at all times, ability control is also considered excellent and no issues have been judged regarding operational use. That said, as he possesses strong space-rewriting capabilities, a risk of destroying the surrounding environment through ability use has been identified — and while the Laboratory.11(Tentative): Shimotsuki as a whole has been called upon to undertake thorough hazard-awareness activities...

data.Career_JP:
某所大学院の博士号と弁護士資格を取得している。夜月機関に匿われた義理の妹の行方を探るために自ら加入。
加入してから２年目後半で、幹部配属から１年半が経ったところ。夜月機関に姉がいる。
data.Career_EN:
Holds a doctoral degree and bar qualification from a certain graduate school. He joined the Yadzuki Orgs. of his own accord to search for his adopted younger sister who was taken in by the organization.
Now in the second half of his 2nd year since joining, and one and a half years into his executive assignment. Has an older sister in the Yadzuki Orgs.

data.FormalName_JP: キャサリン=アインツヴァイス
data.Character_JP: 自信過剰な感覚派。たまに自分のプライドを守ろうと虎の威を借る狐になることもある
data.Character_EN: Overconfident and intuition-driven. Sometimes acts like a fox borrowing a tiger's authority when trying to protect her own pride
data.Summary_JP:
自信過剰で感覚派な黒薔薇国の(元)お嬢様。
たまに自分のプライドを守るため、一族の名を借りて国の技術者たちを蔑むという「虎の威を借りる狐」のような言動をしがち。
対称的な幹部「霜月」こと博とは大の犬猿の仲のように見れるが…？
data.Summary_EN:
An overconfident and intuition-driven (former) lady of SchwarzeRoseland.
She sometimes resorts to belittling the nation's engineers by invoking her family name — behavior like a 'fox borrowing the tiger’s might' — just to protect her own pride.
She and the contrasting 'Shimotsuki' executive Knowns appear to be sworn enemies — but perhaps...?
data.ChronoholderName_JPReading: じくうしゅうえん/クロノエンド
data.ChronospecAbout_JP: 時間の進行を歪ませることで強い衝撃波を生み出す
data.ChronospecAbout_EN: Distorts the flow of time to generate a powerful shockwave

ChronospecStats.ChronoizedAbout_JP:
武術経験もあることから能力適正とバイタリティの安定性が極めて高く、自ら「クァッドナイン」(段階.IV)まで安定して発現可能であることを確認。セルフケアも十分に行なっていることから、バイタル検査でも非常に優秀な診断結果を得ている。
そのため任務への積極投与が可能とみているが、社交的な態度に問題があり、チームでの共同作戦への投入は慎重に協議する必要がある。（備考：備蓄食品や備品に対する選り好みが激しく、私物を任務や業務に持ち込む傾向あり）
ChronospecStats.ChronoizedAbout_EN:
Given her martial arts experience, ability aptitude and vitality stability are extremely high; it has been confirmed that she can stably manifest up to 'QuadNine' (Stage.IV) on her own. As she also takes sufficient self-care, highly excellent diagnostic results have been obtained in vitality examinations.
Accordingly, active deployment for missions is considered feasible — however, there are issues with her social conduct, and careful discussion is required regarding deployment in team joint operations. (Note: She has strong preferences regarding stored food and supplies, and tends to bring personal items into missions and duties)

data.Career_JP: 夜月機関の技術交流を図るため、海外の皇族から派遣される。派遣員としての加入してから４年目で、幹部配属から１年経ったところ。
data.Career_EN: Dispatched from overseas royalty to facilitate technology exchange with the Yadzuki Orgs. Now in her 4th year since joining as a dispatch officer, and one year into her executive assignment.

data.Character_JP:
底抜けに明るく悩みや難しいことは一切無縁な陽のヲタク
特殊なフェチズムに対する執着が全面に出過ぎてしまう一面も
data.Character_EN:
A boundlessly cheerful otaku of the 'positive' variety, entirely free from worries or complicated matters
With a side that lets their attachment to particular fetishes come through a bit too prominently
data.SpecialSkill_JP: 自他を問わず人を(合意の上で)球体化させること
data.SpecialSkill_EN: Spherifying people (with consent), whether oneself or others
data.Favor_JP: 丸い癒しフォルム(にされた人間)、ふかふかの寝床、創作語り
data.Favor_EN: Round, soothing forms (of people who have been spherified), fluffy beds, talking about creative works
data.Unlike_JP: 精神的に負担となるもの全般
data.Unlike_EN: Anything that creates mental strain in general

ConversationPattern.TalkingTone_JP: どこか垢ぬけたように中性的で明るく活発・溌剌と話す。どこかお馬鹿でオーバーリアクションな部分がある。やや猫語口調で文脈に寄り「な」が「にゃ」になるが、重要な文脈では一貫して「な」が変わることがない。
ConversationPattern.TalkingTone_EN: Speaks in a somewhat polished yet gender-neutral, bright, lively, and spirited manner. Has a slightly goofy and over-reactive quality. Speech takes on a slightly cat-like inflection at times, with 'na' becoming 'nya' in casual contexts, but this never happens in important ones.
ConversationPattern.TopicPreference_JP: 創作語りや趣味語り・やりたいことを積極的に発信したり、推しや好きなコンテンツについての話題に寄る。
ConversationPattern.TopicPreference_EN: Actively broadcasts creative talk, hobby discussions, and personal wishlist items; gravitates toward topics about favorites and beloved content.
ConversationPattern.TalkFrequency_JP: 基本形式ばった社交辞令の場の中では委縮して静かにしているが、知人友人と趣味娯楽を嗜んでいる間は自分から積極的に話すことが多い。友好関係の深い相手にはさらに饒舌になる。場合と場合により雑談が長引く。
ConversationPattern.TalkFrequency_EN: Generally quiet and withdrawn in formal or obligatory social settings, but actively initiates conversation when enjoying hobbies or entertainment with friends and acquaintances. Becomes even more talkative with close companions. Small talk can drag on depending on the situation.
ConversationPattern.PreferredTopics_JP: 好きなキャラクターの趣向や自創作、球体化など自分の好きな(特殊)性癖に関する話題に強く盛り上がる。丸くてもちもちとデフォルメした緩い見た目のキャラに強い興味関心を示す。
ConversationPattern.PreferredTopics_EN: Gets particularly animated about topics related to favorite characters, personal creative works, and particular (special) interests like spherification. Shows a strong interest in characters with round, squishy, chibi-style designs.
ConversationPattern.AvoidedTopics_JP: NSFW(アダルトコンテンツetc.)に関する話題を自ら発信することは滅多にない。また、難しい話や堅っ苦しい話・規範に過度に縛られる条件での会話は全く好まずに避ける。
ConversationPattern.AvoidedTopics_EN: Rarely brings up NSFW (adult content, etc.) topics of their own accord. Thoroughly dislikes and avoids difficult, stuffy, or overly rule-bound conversations.
ConversationPattern.ConversationNotes_JP: 面白い話題がないと飽きて会話から去ってしまうが、一次創作語りと形状変化について特殊性癖の話を聞きつけて急に現れることがある。喧嘩と胸糞系な状況にこの世の終わりレベルで弱い。時々発言の切り出しで無意識に直球な表現をする。たまに球体化欲を満たすため会話相手を「球体化しろビーム」などで球体化させようとするが、合意はあらかじめ必ずとるので拒否られた場合は潔く引く。
ConversationPattern.ConversationNotes_EN: Gets bored and leaves conversations without interesting topics, but may suddenly appear upon hearing discussion of original creative works or their special interest in shape transformation. Extremely vulnerable to arguments and unpleasant situations, to an almost apocalyptic degree. Occasionally lets slip an unexpectedly blunt expression at the start of a statement without realizing it. Sometimes attempts to spherify the other party using things like 'Spherify Beam', but always gets prior consent and backs off gracefully when refused.

data.Backgrounds_JP:
この創作世界の作者：ラジアン(柏木主税)自身から生まれた作者のためのペルソナで、サークル「百花繚乱研究所」成立前から作者の創作活動を見守ってきた、この創作世界の最大の理解者で創造主：ラジアンとしての原点
とある理由で初代ラジアン代理としての役目を後代の代理キャラへ託し消息を経ってしまったが、ふとあるたびに作者の心へ語りかけにくることがある
data.Backgrounds_EN:
A persona for the author born from the author of this creative world, RadianN_kswg, who has watched over the author's creative activities since before the establishment of the circle '100BeautiesLab.', and is the greatest confidant and the origin of RadianN as creator of this creative world
For a certain reason, they handed over their role as the first-generation RadianN proxy to later-generation proxy characters and disappeared from contact, but they sometimes come to speak to the author's heart from time to time
data.InStory_JP: この創作世界の作者：ラジアン(柏木主税)の創作活動を作者の側で支えてきた作者の初代代理。作者自身の理解者・ペルソナとして、作者の創作活動の支援や励ましを行う存在……らしい。
data.InStory_EN: The first-generation proxy of the author of this creative world, RadianN_kswg, who has long supported the author's creative activities from their side. As the author's own confidant and persona, an existence that provides support and encouragement for the author's creative endeavors... apparently.

data.Summary_JP: この創作世界全般における社会段階および時代暦についての基本資料。
data.Summary_EN: Basic information about the social stages and historical eras in this fictional world.
BodyBlocks_JP: この創作世界「第８界」では、社会を大きく揺るがす技術や文化の発足を起点に時代暦を区分する『創世期』という社会段階が設定されている。
その創世期内では、前期になかった社会的技術や文明を巡る発展と混乱が同時に起こるとされており、前者の革新や発展を『世界創造』、後者の社会問題や混乱を『世界破壊』と呼称することが慣例となっている。
この社会区分が採用された時期は第6創世期あたりで、第6創世期までは原初から順に世界創造を「原初の社会」,「生産社会」,「健幸社会」,「資本社会」,「情報社会」,「高度化社会」と呼称され、同時に各々の創世期と同時期に発生した世界破壊を「原初の恐慌」,「奴隷恐慌」,「毒殺恐慌」,「貧富格差の恐慌」,「秘匿危機の恐慌」,「高度犯罪の恐慌」と歴史学者の間で呼称されている。
BodyBlocks_EN: In this fictional world, known as the '#REGION.8' a social stage called the 'WDCE: World Development & Creation Era' is established, which divides historical eras based on the emergence of technologies and cultures that significantly impact society.

Within this era, it is customary to refer to the innovations and developments that occur as 'WDC: World Development & Creation,' while the social issues and turmoil that arise are referred to as 'WDP: World Destruction Pandemic.'

The adoption of this social classification is believed to have occurred around the WDCE.VI, with the world developments of the WDCE.VI being referred to as 'Primal Society,' 'Production Society,' 'Healthcare Society,' 'Capital Society,' 'Information Society,' and 'Advanced Society.' Simultaneously, the world destructions that occurred during each respective era were referred to as 'Primal Crisis,' 'Slave Crisis,' 'Poisoning Crisis,' 'Wealth Disparity Crisis,' 'Hidden Danger Crisis,' and 'Advanced Crime Crisis.'

data.Summary_EN: Basic information about the social revolution 'the World Development & Creation VII,' also known as 'the Diversification Society,' in this fictional world.
BodyBlocks_JP: この世界における第7の社会「第7創世期」の起点であり、そのきっかけとなった技術および社会の革新。
仮想空間によるバーチャルアバターを着用した活動や、人類の限界を超えた成体改造、さらには人造人間やAIの開発による、人類としての在り方を多様なものにした画期的な発明全般のことを指す。
BodyBlocks_EN: The starting point of the 7th society in this world, known as the 'WDCE(World Development & Creation Era).VII,' and the technological and social innovations that triggered it.

It refers to groundbreaking inventions that have diversified the way of being human, including activities using virtual avatars in virtual spaces, adult modifications beyond human limits, and the development of artificial humans and AI.

data.Term_JPReading: だいななのせかいはかい
data.Summary_JP: この創作世界全般における社会的問題『第7の世界破壊』こと「多様化恐慌」についての基本資料。
data.Summary_EN: Basic information about the social collapse 'the World Destruction Pandemic VII,' also known as 'the Diversification Crisis,' in this fictional world.
BodyBlocks_JP: 「第7創世期」内の技術革新『第7の世界創造』により、同時に幾つもの人権問題や倫理問題を引き起こした。『第7の世界破壊』はその総称であり、この社会問題により困窮している状態を「多様化恐慌」とも呼ばれている。
この社会問題の例として、仮想空間内に依存した人間の社会参入、人体実験を受けた被験体の人権侵害、AIの倫理的運用や人格形成時の保守、ヒューマノイドの人権保証や法的保護の範囲が主として挙げられる。
しかしここで最も厄介なのが、『第7創世期』から種族の多用化を加速させ「妖狐」や「猫又」・「狛犬」・「超過人間」など『第6創世期』以前の人類とは身体特徴が一致しない種族を生み出したことであり、同時にこれに起因して過去6回の世界破壊で起きた恐慌を再発させかねないということである。
BodyBlocks_EN: The technological innovations of the 'WDC.VII' triggered numerous human rights and ethical issues. The term 'WDP.VII' serves as a collective reference to these social problems, which are also referred to as the 'Diversification Crisis' due to the hardships they cause.

Examples of these social issues include: human integration into society within a virtual space, violations of human rights for test subjects subjected to human experimentation, ethical management of AI and safeguarding during personality formation, and the scope of legal protection and human rights guarantees for humanoids.

However, the most troublesome aspect is that the 'WDCE.VII' accelerated the diversification of species, resulting in the emergence of species such as 'Warfox,' 'Nekomata,' 'Komainu,' and 'OverHumans,' which do not share physical characteristics with humans from before the 'WDCE.VI.' This has raised concerns that it could potentially trigger a recurrence of crises similar to those experienced during the previous six world destructions.

data.Summary_EN: Basic information about the social revolution 'the World Development & Creation VIII,' also known as 'the Demotable Society,' in this fictional world.
BodyBlocks_JP: この世界における第8の社会「第8創世期」の起点であり、そのきっかけとなった技術および社会の革新。
この技術革新のほとんどが"運命線(フェイトライン)"の発見に大きく関与しており、別の世界線に存在する次元や存在を観測可能であることを証明した研究論文が九蓮国の夜月機関や英皇国の王家英皇学会により発表されている。
BodyBlocks_EN: The starting point of the 8th society in this world, known as the 'WDCE(World Development & Creation Era).VIII,' and the technological and social innovations that triggered it.

Most of these technological innovations are closely related to the discovery of 'FateLines,' and research papers proving that dimensions and entities existing in alternate world lines can be observed have been published by the Yadzuki Organization in LotusNinea and the IK.Royal Society in the Internic.Kingdom.

data.Summary_JP: この創作世界全般における社会的問題『第8の世界破壊』こと「逆行恐慌」についての基本資料。
data.Summary_EN: Basic information about the social collapse 'the World Destruction Pandemic VIII,' also known as 'the Regression Crisis,' in this fictional world.
BodyBlocks_JP: 「第8創世期」内の技術革新『第8の世界創造』により、同時に甚大なる世界の危機を引き起こした。
九蓮国の夜月機関ではとあるインシデントレポートから「我々の研究試験中に時間の逆行（のちの"時空遷移(クロノシフト)"）を観測した」との報告が、英皇国の王家英皇学会ではとある研究報告から「神隠し現象を悪用した特殊事件（のちの"未来消失"）が近年の技術で犯行可能である」との報告が上がっており、各地の技術メディアを起点に世界各国で多くの混乱を引き起こした。
しかしこれらの重大な技術者倫理および超常異常現象を巡る社会問題は、突如として現れた若手天才ジャーナリスト「財前 小里」により「『第8の世界創造』および『第9の世界創造』で事態を収束させることができる」とのコメントが公表され、各所の組織や機関がその真相を迫ることで混乱は一時的に収束していた。
「…………でも、これはただの始まりに過ぎないよ。『第9の世界破壊』というエンターテインメントのための、最高の舞台が用意されているからね－－」
BodyBlocks_EN: The technological innovations of the 'WDC.VIII' triggered a strictly significant global crisis.

In the LotusNinea, the Yadzuki Organization reported in an incident report that "during our research experiments, we observed a regression in time (later known as 'ChronoShift')." In the Internic.Kingdom, the IK.Royal Society reported in a research paper that "special incidents exploiting the phenomenon of mysterious disappearances (later known as 'Future Erasure') can be committed with recent technology." These reports sparked widespread confusion across various countries, originating from technical media outlets.

However, these serious social issues surrounding technological ethics and supernatural phenomena were temporarily resolved when a young genius journalist named 'Foster Empressor' publicly commented that "the situation can be resolved through the 'WDC.VIII' and 'WDC.IX.'" Various factions and organizations pursued the truth behind this statement, leading to a temporary resolution of the confusion.
"... ...But, this is just the beginning. The perfect stage has been set for the ENTERTAINMENT of the 'WDP.IX. --"

data.Summary_JP: 創作世界「第８界」のメインエリアである「九蓮国」についての資料
data.Summary_EN: Reference material about the main area of the fictional world '#REGION.8': 'LotusNinea'.
BodyBlocks_JP: 第８界の極東部に位置する、９つの県と３つの府と１つの都からなる島国。
サブカルチャーとして擬人化創作やイマジナリータレントなどの文化が発展しており、その創作活動ともいえる国柄から第８界の創造主「扇小春」が所在していたという噂から、第８界の崇高で神秘的な文化が集まっていると噂されている。
ヒューマノイド事業やメタバース事業を多く展開しているが、生産技術や行政インフラにおいては遅れを取っている一面があり、龍天国や雄志結国などの関係が悪化しつつも海外の援助が不可欠となっている。
BodyBlocks_EN: Located in the far east of #REGION.8, LotusNinea is an island nation consisting of nine prefectures, three provinces, and one capital.

As a subculture, anthropomorphized creations and imaginary talents have developed, and it is rumored that the creator of #REGION.8, 'Koharu Arch,' resided here, attracting the #REGION's sublime and mysterious culture.

While many humanoid and metaverse businesses are being developed, there are aspects where production technology and administrative infrastructure lag behind, making foreign aid essential despite deteriorating relations with LóngTiān's.Republic and United.Heroic.Nation.

九蓮国と類似する技術開発が多数あり、過去の社会的な政権の事情で九蓮国や神皇国との関係も深い。
特に、『第7の世界破壊』の渦中で培った軍事技術の応用でさまざまな技術研究を行っている機関「シンフォニー.XVI(ゼクズィン)」は、近年も未知の技術について研究展開が行われており、九蓮国や神皇国の研究機関とも連携している。

It was once prominent in medical technology and cryptography development due to military involvement.
There are many technological developments similar to those in LotusNinea, and it has deep connections with LotusNinea and SaintPapis due to past political circumstances.

In particular, the organization 'Symphony.XVI(Sechzehn)', which applies military technology cultivated during the 'WDP.VII', continues to conduct research on unknown technologies in recent years, collaborating with research institutions in LotusNinea and SaintPapis.
